title: Quantum State Discrimination: Optimal Strategies
description: Learn the fundamental limits and optimal strategies for distinguishing quantum states. Master minimum error discrimination, unambiguous discrimination, and the Helstrom bound for binary hypothesis testing.
learningObjectives: Derive the Helstrom bound for minimum error discrimination
Implement optimal measurements for distinguishing two quantum states
Compare minimum error and unambiguous discrimination strategies
Apply state discrimination to quantum communication protocols
Analyze the role of prior probabilities in optimal discrimination
